title: PolyWorkBench: Benchmarking Multilingual Long-Horizon LLM Agents

searches: "PolyWorkBench: Benchmarking Multilingual Long-Horizon LLM Agents" code dataset
official_release_audit.finding: The discoverable official GitHub organization exposes one repository containing a static leaderboard homepage (index.html plus image assets). Its recursive main-branch tree contains no task data, graders, harness, README, license, or downloadable benchmark release. No separate official code/data release was located in the two recorded title/author/project searches as of acquisition time. This is release-availability evidence, not proof that no private or unindexed release exists.
